title: HEALTH ENGAGEMENT AND WELLNESS SERVICES - 211info
text: KAISER PERMANENTE NORTHEAST REGION MEDICAL GROUP HEALTH ENGAGEMENT AND WELLNESS SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides health classes available in person and online. Class topics include pregnancy, parenting, substance use disorders and a variety of other health-related classes. 500 NE Multnomah Boulevard Suite 100 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Varies by class Hours: Varies by class (503) 286-6816 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main (503) 286-6816 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to register FEES: Varies by class DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Childbirth Education General Health Education Programs General Health Education Programs * Substance Use Disorder Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - CANCER COUNSELING CENTER HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - MEDICAL FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PATIENT NAVIGATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
